All services

Natural Language Processing

Make sense of language at scale

Understand, search, and generate text — from documents to conversations.

Start a project See related work

What this looks like

We build NLP systems for semantic search, summarization, classification, extraction, and conversational assistants grounded in your data.

Retrieval & search

Semantic and hybrid search over your own content.

Extraction & summaries

Pull structured facts and concise summaries from long text.

Grounded assistants

Chat and Q&A grounded in your sources, with citations.

Typical deliverables

  • RAG pipelines
  • Embeddings & vector search
  • Summarization & extraction
  • Conversational assistants

My New AI

My New AI is an independent AI software studio — we design, build, and ship intelligent applications, from custom AI apps to machine learning, NLP, and computer vision.
